title: Better PvP Visual
description: BPV make your Gameplay better, perfect for all type of PvP or Vanilla player, it reduces view waste like totem pop and shield blocking
body:
# **What Better PvP Visual do:**
This Resource Pack make your Gameplay **better**, perfect for all PvP Players (**CPVP**), it **reduces view waste like totem**, shield and fire but it make a lot of useful things to _perfect_ the game.

**In short: it basically makes your game cleaner and reduces visual chaos.** _**(Watch under)**_

![Head over to the gallery to see all the great features of this Resource Pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1587b175c5a3caaadd4527e183bf11435d68a4a0.png)
### Here is a summary of the features of this resource pack:
1. It reduce the size of a lot of items (Totem, Shield, Golden apple)

2. It make game GUIs black (Like night settings)
 
3. It make a lot of cool animations (Fire Rocket, Blaze Rod, Ender Pearls...)
 
4. It reduce the visual space waste (from: shield, totem size/pop/particles, pumpking blur)

5. It add an exlamation mark to the powder snow to allert you from fall into it.
 
6. It remove the crystal explosion smoke and also the campfire and fire smoke

7. It change the texture of crystals, redstone, tools and other things to save visual space
 
8. It change the font of minecraft to make it simpler and cleaner
 
9. It add some 3D models to Mace and also to the End Crystals

### **In short: it basically makes your game cleaner and reduces visual chaos.**


<details>
<summary>Credits, Info & Comments</summary>


```
"Credits: Vanilla Plus V2 (3D) | Totem Tweaks | Powder Snow Alerts | Mace but 3D | Vanilla-Plus | Pumpkin Overlay - Frame"
This pack isn't make by DS: @aimluca but he only take some features from other cool pack and he combined them in this pack
```


</details>

_If you have any problems, please feel free to contact me._ [Discord link]
